user:
Pod name: celery-worker
Namespace: data-pipeline
Image: docker.io/myorg/celery-worker:latest
ENTRYPOINT: ["celery"]
CMD: ["-A", "tasks.app", "worker", "--loglevel=info"]

Identify the main entry point source file for this pod.

assistant.reasoning: CMD passes '-A tasks.app' to celery, which means the Celery application object is defined in tasks/app.py. This is the standard Celery module path convention.
